entries.label: Thumbnail Catalog Studio
entries.prompt: clean catalog studio thumbnail of Abby, very light gray seamless background, controlled studio lighting, readable small-thumbnail composition
entries.negative_prompt: selfie, phone visible, camera visible, arm extended toward camera, mirror selfie, walking, running, dancing, lying down, crouching, action pose, extreme perspective, dutch angle, crowded environment, busy background, cropped feet, hands covering face, duplicate person

metadata.finish: clean commercial catalog finish with crisp wardrobe readability
metadata.color_treatment: neutral color, soft skin tones, light gray background

entries.label: Thumbnail Vehicle Catalog
entries.prompt: clean catalog thumbnail of a single hero vehicle, simple controlled background, readable silhouette
entries.negative_prompt: selfie, phone visible, camera visible, arm extended toward camera, mirror selfie, walking, running, dancing, lying down, crouching, action pose, extreme perspective, dutch angle, crowded environment, busy background, cropped feet, hands covering face, duplicate person

metadata.camera_behavior: locked catalog camera, no motion blur

entries.label: Thumbnail Destination Catalog
entries.prompt: clear destination catalog thumbnail, recognizable architecture or environment, uncluttered bright readable scene
entries.negative_prompt: selfie, phone visible, camera visible, arm extended toward camera, mirror selfie, walking, running, dancing, lying down, crouching, action pose, extreme perspective, dutch angle, crowded environment, busy background, cropped feet, hands covering face, duplicate person

metadata.finish: clean travel catalog finish with readable location detail
